name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Execution via Diskshadow
notes:
This Building Block detects using Diskshadow.exe to execute arbitrary code in text file.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Ivan Dyachkov, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Execution via Diskshadow.exe
SIGMA Description: Detects using Diskshadow.exe to execute arbitrary code in text file


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Execution via Diskshadow on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of diskshadow.exe
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/s%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-s%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Execution via Diskshadow on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of diskshadow.exe
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/s%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-s%' AQL filter query
